answer:
**Chapter 78 of the *Kātyāyana Smṛti* addresses the topic of the wife and other heirs to the property of a sonless man (*aputra-purushasya dhanasya patni-adayo dhanadhikarinah*).**[^1]

It opens with this heading and discusses rules of inheritance in such cases, including priorities among heirs like the wife, daughters, the father's heirs, the teacher's heirs, and reunited coparceners. Distinctive phrases emphasize "wife heirs property," "heirs property sonless," and "property sonless man." The chapter closes by noting that reunited coparceners are heirs to each other in the absence of issue.[^2]

[^1]: Kātyāyana, *Kātyāyana Smṛti*, ch. 78, opening paragraph [p-be89be](/works/unknown-katyayana-smrti-1e06d2/78/translation/#p-be89be).
[^2]: Kātyāyana, *Kātyāyana Smṛti*, ch. 78, closing paragraph [p-3acb45](/works/unknown-katyayana-smrti-1e06d2/78/translation/#p-3acb45).
